PowerShell($path = "d:\\Repos\\PWDS\\pwds-soruban\\pss-2.0-global\\.claude\\screen-tracker\\REGISTRY.md"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $needle = '| 13 | Refund | Fundraising | FLOW | COMPLETED | Donation \(GlobalDonation\), Contact, MasterData \(REFUNDSTATUS/REFUNDREASON\), Staff'; $replacement = '| 13 | Refund | Fundraising | FLOW | NEEDS_FIX \(v2\) | Donation \(GlobalDonation\), Contact, MasterData \(REFUNDSTATUS/REFUNDREASON\), Staff'; if \($text.Contains\($needle\)\) { $newText = $text.Replace\($needle, $replacement\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($path, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($newText\)\); Write-Output "OK: replaced" } else { Write-Output "FAIL" })

PowerShell($path = 'd:\\Repos\\PWDS\\pwds-soruban\\pss-2.0-global\\.claude\\screen-tracker\\prompts\\refund.md'; $tmp  = 'd:\\Repos\\PWDS\\pwds-soruban\\pss-2.0-global\\.claude\\screen-tracker\\prompts\\_refund-v2-new.md.tmp'; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $content = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $marker = "## `u{2139} Enhancement v2 `u{2014} Country-Aware Refund Method Capture"; $idx = $content.IndexOf\($marker\); if \($idx -lt 0\) { throw "marker not found" }; $truncated = $content.Substring\(0, $idx\); $newSection = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($tmp\); $merged = $truncated + $newSection; $utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $merged, $utf8NoBom\); Remove-Item $tmp -Force; Write-Output "Old size: $\($bytes.Length\) bytes -> new size: $\(\(Get-Item $path\).Length\) bytes"; Write-Output "Truncation index: $idx")

PowerShell($out = & npx --prefix PSS_2.0_Frontend tsc -p PSS_2.0_Frontend --noEmit 2>&1; $reviewLines = $out | Select-String -Pattern "reviewreplies","review-replies"; if \($reviewLines\) { "REVIEWREPLIES ERRORS:"; $reviewLines } else { "No reviewreplies errors." }; "TOTAL ERROR LINES: $\(\($out | Select-String -Pattern 'error TS'\).Count\)")

PowerShell(Push-Location PSS_2.0_Frontend; try { $out = & npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; $reviewErrors = $out | Select-String -Pattern "reviewreplies","review-replies"; if \($reviewErrors\) { "REVIEWREPLIES ERRORS:"; $reviewErrors } else { "No reviewreplies/review-replies tsc errors." }; "TOTAL TS ERRORS: $\(\($out | Select-String -Pattern 'error TS'\).Count\)" } finally { Pop-Location })

PowerShell($out = & npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; $reviewErrors = $out | Select-String -Pattern "reviewreplies|review-replies"; if \($reviewErrors\) { "REVIEWREPLIES ERRORS:"; $reviewErrors } else { "No reviewreplies/review-replies tsc errors." }; "TOTAL TS ERROR LINES: $\(\($out | Select-String -Pattern 'error TS'\).Count\)"; "FIRST 30 ERRORS:"; $out | Select-String -Pattern "error TS" | Select-Object -First 30)
